module_sme_rollup.name: Project Setup & Structure
module_sme_rollup.description: Create, organize, and template projects with clear scope, hierarchy, and traceability.

statements.text: Create project master records with core attributes, status lifecycle, and customer/contract linkage.
Organize projects into phases, milestones, and nested work breakdown structure with reusable templates.
Define project scope of work and apply custom fields and tags for business classification.
Create and assign tasks with priority, deadline, assignee, and task-subtask hierarchy.
Define task dependencies with finish-to-start and start-to-start relationships and auto-schedule.

module_sme_rollup.name: Resource & Schedule Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Allocate resources, track capacity, and maintain realistic project schedules.

statements.text: Assign team members to projects and tasks with specified effort hours and skill matching.
View resource availability and capacity across all active projects with over/under-allocation alerts.
Exclude leave and public holidays from capacity calculations automatically.
Drag-and-drop resources and tasks on timeline views to adjust schedules visually.
Display interactive Gantt chart with critical path, slack visibility, and baseline overlay.
Report resource utilisation rates as billable or productive hours against available hours.

module_sme_rollup.name: Time, Cost & Billing
module_sme_rollup.description: Track labour and expenses, manage budgets, and generate accurate invoices.

statements.text: Log hours against projects and tasks with real-time timer and weekly grid view.
Classify time entries as billable or non-billable and route timesheets through approval workflow.
Lock timesheet records after approval to prevent unauthorised modification.
Capture and approve expense claims by category with receipt upload and policy validation.
Define project budgets by labour, materials, travel, and subcontractor with real-time tracking.
Calculate labour costs automatically from timesheets and alert when spend exceeds threshold.
Generate invoices from time-and-materials, fixed-price, and milestone-based contracts.
Generate unbilled time and expense reports for review before invoicing.
Post invoices to accounts receivable and consolidate multiple projects into single customer invoice.

module_sme_rollup.name: Execution & Collaboration
module_sme_rollup.description: Track progress, manage risks, and enable team communication.

statements.text: Track task progress through predefined workflow states with real-time dashboard and reports.
Use Kanban board with configurable columns, swimlanes, and work-in-progress limits.
Store, version, and control access to project files with threaded comments and activity feed.
Send email notifications for task assignments, updates, mentions, and deadline reminders.
Record risks with probability, impact, and mitigation plan; track through lifecycle.
Log issues with severity, owner, and target resolution; escalate high-severity automatically.
Capture change requests with impact analysis and route through multi-level approval workflow.

module_sme_rollup.name: Reporting & Insights
module_sme_rollup.description: Monitor project health, profitability, and team performance.

statements.text: Display project health with Red/Amber/Green status and milestone completion tracking.
Compare actual project costs against budget with variance analysis by project.
Calculate project profitability as revenue minus direct and indirect costs by type and client.
Navigate from portfolio summary to individual project and task-level details.
Export reports and dashboards to PDF or CSV; deliver automatically via email on schedule.

module_sme_rollup.name: Platform & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Secure access, enable integrations, and maintain compliance.

statements.text: Support role-based access control with project-level restrictions and single sign-on integration.
Encrypt data at rest and in transit; maintain audit logs of all user actions.
Implement automated data retention policies and backup/disaster recovery procedures.
Provide REST API and integrate with accounting, calendar, and third-party systems.
Import and export project data via CSV, Excel, or PDF on demand.
Enable mobile and multi-device access with responsive UI and push notifications.
Provide customer portal for project visibility, deliverable sign-off, and change requests.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your project data is accessible, secure, and connected to your other business systems. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA regulations and protect client information, while your team needs to access projects from the office, site, or home on any device. Without this foundation, you risk data breaches, compliance violations, and siloed information that slows decision-making.

Project Core.narrative: This family gives you the core tools to plan, assign, and track work—from breaking down a project into tasks to reminding the team of deadlines and keeping documents in one place. For a Singapore SME juggling multiple clients or internal initiatives, this prevents tasks from falling through the cracks and keeps everyone aligned on what's due and who's responsible. A construction firm using templates to standardise site handover checklists, or a consulting firm using Kanban to manage concurrent client engagements, both rely on these capabilities daily.

Time & Resources.narrative: This family tracks who is working on what, how long it takes, and what it costs—critical for billing clients accurately and spotting when your team is overloaded. Singapore SMEs often bill by the hour or need to prove time spent to clients; without time tracking and resource visibility, you lose revenue and burn out staff. A digital agency tracking billable hours per client project, or a professional services firm balancing resource demand across multiple engagements, both depend on this to stay profitable.

Financial Control.narrative: This family keeps projects on budget and ensures you invoice correctly and on time—protecting your cash flow and profit margins. Singapore SMEs often operate on tight margins; if you don't track costs against budget or automate invoicing, you'll either underbid work or chase late payments. A renovation contractor managing material costs and milestone billing, or a software development firm handling change requests and time-and-materials invoicing, both need these controls to stay solvent.

Delivery & Tracking.narrative: This family helps you see the big picture—what's on track, what's at risk, and when you'll finish—while automating approvals and keeping customers in the loop. Singapore SMEs often manage projects with tight deadlines and demanding clients; a Gantt chart and risk register help you spot delays early, while a customer portal reduces back-and-forth emails and builds trust. A logistics firm managing delivery schedules, or a marketing agency coordinating campaign milestones with clients, both use these tools to stay visible and responsive.

Analytics & Reporting.narrative: This family turns project data into insights—showing you which projects are profitable, how efficiently your team works, and where to improve. Singapore SMEs need to understand profitability and performance to make smarter bids and staffing decisions; standard dashboards and reports save time and reveal patterns that spreadsheets hide. A consulting firm reviewing project margins to adjust pricing, or a services firm benchmarking team utilisation across clients, both use analytics to stay competitive.
